findings.title: Missing null check
findings.failure_mode_justification: Null dereference causes unhandled exception and process crash.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: Plausible null scenario but requires assumption about caller input.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Observed at parse.py:12; no caller trace performed.
findings.effort_to_fix_justification: Add a null check before dereference.
